Termination of Conservation Stewardship Program, , , provided that:Pub. L. 115–334, title II, § 2301(c)(2)132 Stat. 4552Dec. 20, 2018“Effective on the date of enactment of this Act [], the conservation stewardship program under subchapter B of chapter 2 of subtitle D of title XII of the Food Security Act of 1985 ( et seq.) (as in effect on the day before the date of enactment of this Act) shall cease to be effective.”Dec. 20, 201816 U.S.C. 3838d
